title: Cookie Bridge — Transfer COOK between Cookie Chain & Solana
content:
Cookie Bridge — Transfer COOK between Cookie Chain & Solana

The Cookie Bridge lets you move COOK between Solana and Cookie Chain through a community-operated multi-sig vault.

Bridge URL: https://bridge.cookiescan.io

How it works:
- Solana → Cookie Chain: deposit COOK into the bridge vault on Solana mainnet. Once the multi-sig threshold is met, COOK is unlocked on Cookie Chain.
- Cookie Chain → Solana: the same signer set coordinates the reverse unlock.

Bridge vault address (Vault 0): G3mm95M4ns7mk8oseWGJnirvgyMahMz3vZEUhdJn8oGX
Multisig transparency: sig.cookiechain.wtf/community

Only use the official bridge URL. Verify the URL before signing any transaction.

title: CandyShop — Cookie Chain DEX Aggregator
content:
CandyShop — Cookie Chain DEX Aggregator

CandyShop is the DEX aggregator for Cookie Chain, allowing users to swap tokens at the best available rates across liquidity sources on the network.

URL: https://swap.cookiescan.io

Use CandyShop to swap COOK and other SPL tokens on Cookie Chain. It is the primary trading interface for the Cookie Chain ecosystem.

title: Cookoven — dApp Hub for Cookie Chain
content:
Cookoven — The Hub for dApps on Cookie Chain

Cookoven is the central hub for discovering and accessing decentralized applications (dApps) built on Cookie Chain.

URL: https://cookoven.xyz

Browse the Cookie Chain ecosystem, find live programs, and explore what builders have shipped on the network. Cookoven is the go-to directory for Cookie Chain dApps and ecosystem projects.
